option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
version: "3.9"
services: # ── Traefik reverse proxy ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── traefik: image: traefik:v3.2 container_name: traefik command: - "--api.insecure=true" # Dashboard la :8080 - "--providers.docker=true" - "--providers.docker.exposedbydefault=false" - "--entrypoints.web.address=:80" ports: - "80:80" - "8080:8080" # Traefik dashboard volumes: - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro networks: - licenta-net
# ── RabbitMQ ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── rabbitmq: image: rabbitmq:3.13-management-alpine container_name: rabbitmq environment: RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: guest RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: guest ports: - "5672:5672" - "15672:15672" networks: - licenta-net healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "ping"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
# ── PostgreSQL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── postgres: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: postgres environment: POSTGRES_DB: User-Licenta POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 1234 ports: - "5433:5432" volumes: - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data - ./db-init:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d networks: - licenta-net healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
# ── User microservice (Spring Boot) ───────────────────────────────────────── user-service: build: context: ./User dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: user-service environment: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/User-Licenta SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 1234 depends_on: postgres: condition: service_healthy networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.user-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/api`)" - "traefik.http.routers.user-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.user-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8081"
# ── Weather microservice (Spring Boot) ────────────────────────────────────── weather-service: build: context: ./Weather dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: weather-service environment: VISUAL_CROSSING_API_KEY: ${VISUAL_CROSSING_API_KEY} networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.weather-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/weather`)" - "traefik.http.routers.weather-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.weather-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8082"
# ── AI microservice (Spring Boot + Gemini) ────────────────────────────────── ai-service: build: context: ./AIService dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: ai-service environment: GEMINI_API_KEY: ${GEMINI_API_KEY} SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST: rabbitmq SPRING_RABBITMQ_PORT: 5672 SPRING_RABBITMQ_USERNAME: guest SPRING_RABBITMQ_PASSWORD: guest depends_on: rabbitmq: condition: service_healthy networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.ai-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/ai`)" - "traefik.http.routers.ai-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.ai-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8083"
# ── Games microservice (Spring Boot) ──────────────────────────────────────── games-service: build: context: ./Games dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: games-service environment: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/gamedb SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 1234 SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST: rabbitmq SPRING_RABBITMQ_PORT: 5672 SPRING_RABBITMQ_USERNAME: guest SPRING_RABBITMQ_PASSWORD: guest depends_on: postgres: condition: service_healthy rabbitmq: condition: service_healthy networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.games-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/games`)" - "traefik.http.routers.games-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.games-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8084"
# ── Turism microservice (Spring Boot + Ticketmaster) ─────────────────────── turism-service: build: context: ./Turism dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: turism-service environment: TICKETMASTER_API_KEY: ${TICKETMASTER_API_KEY} SERPAPI_API_KEY: ${SERPAPI_API_KEY} SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST: rabbitmq SPRING_RABBITMQ_PORT: 5672 SPRING_RABBITMQ_USERNAME: guest SPRING_RABBITMQ_PASSWORD: guest depends_on: rabbitmq: condition: service_healthy networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.turism-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/api/turism`)" - "traefik.http.routers.turism-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.turism-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8085"
# ── ChatBox microservice (Spring Boot + AI bridge) ───────────────────────── chatbox-service: build: context: ./ChatBox dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: chatbox-service environment: SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST: rabbitmq SPRING_RABBITMQ_PORT: 5672 SPRING_RABBITMQ_USERNAME: guest SPRING_RABBITMQ_PASSWORD: guest APP_JWT_SECRET: 404E635266556A586E3272357538782F413F4428472B4B6250645367566B5970 depends_on: rabbitmq: condition: service_healthy networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.chatbox-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/chatbox`)" - "traefik.http.routers.chatbox-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.chatbox-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8086"
# ── Frontend (React + Nginx) ───────────────────────────────────────────────── frontend: build: context: ./Frontend dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: frontend depends_on: - user-service - chatbox-service networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.frontend.rule=Host(`localhost`) || Host(`192.168.1.143`)" - "traefik.http.routers.frontend.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.frontend.loadbalancer.server.port=80"
networks: licenta-net: driver: bridge
volumes: postgres-data:

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
version: "3.9"
services: # ── Traefik reverse proxy ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── traefik: image: traefik:v3.2 container_name: traefik command: - "--api.insecure=true" # Dashboard la :8080 - "--providers.docker=true" - "--providers.docker.exposedbydefault=false" - "--entrypoints.web.address=:80" ports: - "80:80" - "8080:8080" # Traefik dashboard volumes: - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro networks: - licenta-net
# ── RabbitMQ ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── rabbitmq: image: rabbitmq:3.13-management-alpine container_name: rabbitmq environment: RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: guest RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: guest ports: - "5672:5672" - "15672:15672" networks: - licenta-net healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "ping"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
# ── PostgreSQL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── postgres: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: postgres environment: POSTGRES_DB: User-Licenta POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: 1234 ports: - "5433:5432" volumes: - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data - ./db-init:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d networks: - licenta-net healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
# ── User microservice (Spring Boot) ───────────────────────────────────────── user-service: build: context: ./User dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: user-service environment: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/User-Licenta SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 1234 depends_on: postgres: condition: service_healthy networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.user-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/api`)" - "traefik.http.routers.user-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.user-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8081"
# ── Weather microservice (Spring Boot) ────────────────────────────────────── weather-service: build: context: ./Weather dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: weather-service environment: VISUAL_CROSSING_API_KEY: ${VISUAL_CROSSING_API_KEY} networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.weather-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/weather`)" - "traefik.http.routers.weather-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.weather-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8082"
# ── AI microservice (Spring Boot + Gemini) ────────────────────────────────── ai-service: build: context: ./AIService dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: ai-service environment: GEMINI_API_KEY: ${GEMINI_API_KEY} SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST: rabbitmq SPRING_RABBITMQ_PORT: 5672 SPRING_RABBITMQ_USERNAME: guest SPRING_RABBITMQ_PASSWORD: guest depends_on: rabbitmq: condition: service_healthy networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.ai-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/ai`)" - "traefik.http.routers.ai-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.ai-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8083"
# ── Games microservice (Spring Boot) ──────────────────────────────────────── games-service: build: context: ./Games dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: games-service environment: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/gamedb SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 1234 SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST: rabbitmq SPRING_RABBITMQ_PORT: 5672 SPRING_RABBITMQ_USERNAME: guest SPRING_RABBITMQ_PASSWORD: guest depends_on: postgres: condition: service_healthy rabbitmq: condition: service_healthy networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.games-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/games`)" - "traefik.http.routers.games-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.games-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8084"
# ── Turism microservice (Spring Boot + Ticketmaster) ─────────────────────── turism-service: build: context: ./Turism dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: turism-service environment: TICKETMASTER_API_KEY: ${TICKETMASTER_API_KEY} SERPAPI_API_KEY: ${SERPAPI_API_KEY} SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST: rabbitmq SPRING_RABBITMQ_PORT: 5672 SPRING_RABBITMQ_USERNAME: guest SPRING_RABBITMQ_PASSWORD: guest depends_on: rabbitmq: condition: service_healthy networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.turism-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/api/turism`)" - "traefik.http.routers.turism-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.turism-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8085"
# ── ChatBox microservice (Spring Boot + AI bridge) ───────────────────────── chatbox-service: build: context: ./ChatBox dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: chatbox-service environment: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/chatboxdb SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: postgres SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: 1234 SPRING_RABBITMQ_HOST: rabbitmq SPRING_RABBITMQ_PORT: 5672 SPRING_RABBITMQ_USERNAME: guest SPRING_RABBITMQ_PASSWORD: guest APP_JWT_SECRET: 404E635266556A586E3272357538782F413F4428472B4B6250645367566B5970 depends_on: rabbitmq: condition: service_healthy networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.chatbox-service.rule=Host(`localhost`) && PathPrefix(`/chatbox`)" - "traefik.http.routers.chatbox-service.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.chatbox-service.loadbalancer.server.port=8086"
# ── Frontend (React + Nginx) ───────────────────────────────────────────────── frontend: build: context: ./Frontend dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: frontend depends_on: - user-service - chatbox-service networks: - licenta-net labels: - "traefik.enable=true" - "traefik.http.routers.frontend.rule=Host(`localhost`) || Host(`192.168.1.143`)" - "traefik.http.routers.frontend.entrypoints=web" - "traefik.http.services.frontend.loadbalancer.server.port=80"
networks: licenta-net: driver: bridge
volumes: postgres-data:

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>4.0.4</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent> <groupId>com.licenta</groupId> <artifactId>ChatBox</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>ChatBox</name> <description>ChatBox</description> <url/> <licenses> <license/> </licenses> <developers> <developer/> </developers> <scm> <connection/> <developerConnection/> <tag/> <url/> </scm> <properties> <java.version>21</java.version> </properties> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-amqp</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-websocket</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId> <version>0.12.6</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId> <version>0.12.6</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId> <version>0.12.6</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId> <version>4.0.4</version> <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --> </parent> <groupId>com.licenta</groupId> <artifactId>ChatBox</artifactId> <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version> <name>ChatBox</name> <description>ChatBox</description> <url/> <licenses> <license/> </licenses> <developers> <developer/> </developers> <scm> <connection/> <developerConnection/> <tag/> <url/> </scm> <properties> <java.version>21</java.version> </properties> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-amqp</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-websocket</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.postgresql</groupId> <artifactId>postgresql</artifactId> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId> <version>0.12.6</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId> <version>0.12.6</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId> <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId> <version>0.12.6</version> <scope>runtime</scope> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build>
</project>
